ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tutorials" (
  "tutorial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tutorial session */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of tutorial session */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course group */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week when the tutorial is held */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time period when the tutorial is held */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the tutorial is conducted */,
  "remark" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the tutorial */,
  "tutorial_start_time" TEXT /* Specific start time of the tutorial */,
  "tutorial_end_time" TEXT /* Specific end time of the tutorial */,
  "tutorial_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the tutorial */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the tutorial is recurring */,
  "recurring_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of recurrence (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tutorial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the tutorial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tutorial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tutorials_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tutorials_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tutorials_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course group */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the course group */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the group */,
  "current_students" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the group */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the group */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groups_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name or ID of the head of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "availability_start_time" TEXT /* Earliest time the venue is available */,
  "availability_end_time" TEXT /* Latest time the venue is available */,
  "is_bookable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the venue is bookable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the venue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the instructor */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or title of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the instructor's office */,
  "availability_start_time" TEXT /* Earliest time the instructor is available */,
  "availability_end_time" TEXT /* Latest time the instructor is available */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the instructor was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instructor's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tutorial_instructors" (
  "tutorial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tutorial session */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the tutorial */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the instructor was assigned to the tutorial */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User ID or name of the person who assigned the instructor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tutorial_id", "instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the student */,
  "matriculation_year" INTEGER /* Year of matriculation */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected year of graduation */,
  "current_semester" TEXT /* Current semester */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the student was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the student's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tutorial_students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "tutorial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tutorial session */,
  "enrolled_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the tutorial */,
  "enrolled_by" TEXT /* User ID or name of the person who enrolled the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "tutorial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "tutorial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tutorial session */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the tutorial session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* Time when attendance was marked */,
  "marked_by" TEXT /* User ID or name of the person who marked the attendance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the attendance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_tutorial_id FOREIGN KEY ("tutorial_id") REFERENCES tutorials ("tutorial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the resource */,
  "is_reusable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the resource is reusable */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the resource was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tutorial_resources" (
  "tutorial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tutorial session */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource used */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was assigned to the tutorial */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* User ID or name of the person who assigned the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tutorial_id", "resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduling_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduling request */,
  "tutorial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tutorial session */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of scheduling request (e.g., change time, change venue) */,
  "request_details" TEXT /* Details of the scheduling request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "requested_by" TEXT /* User ID or name of the person who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User ID or name of the person who approved the request */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved or denied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduling_requests_tutorial_id FOREIGN KEY ("tutorial_id") REFERENCES tutorials ("tutorial_id")
)
